value: 导入错误：about.json 不存在或无效。确定这是一个 Discourse 主题吗？
original_translation: Import Error: about.json does not exist, or is invalid. Are you sure this is a Discourse Theme?

value: 此话题已在%{count}天后自动关闭，不再允许回复。
original_translation: This topic was automatically closed after %{count} days. New replies are no longer allowed.
You have not joined any direct messages yet!

value: 公开显示用的全名（可选）
已在闲置%{count}天后被自动停用
original_translation: Automatically deactivated after %{count} days of inactivity

value: 此话题已在最后回复的%{count}天后自动打开。
original_translation: This topic was automatically opened %{count} days after the last reply.

value: 此话题已在%{count}天后自动打开。
original_translation: This topic was automatically opened after %{count} days.

value: 此话题已在最后一次回复的%{count}天后自动关闭，不再允许回复。
original_translation: This topic was automatically closed %{count} days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.

value: 只得包含汉字、数字、字母、连字符、点和下划线
original_translation: must only include numbers, letters, dashes, dots, and underscores

value: 该用户名无效，用户名只能包含汉字、数字、字母、连字符、点和下划线
original_translation: That username is invalid. It must only include numbers and letters

value: 这是对位于 %{link} 之原始条目的讨论话题。
original_translation: This is a companion discussion topic for the original entry at %{link}

value: 这是 %{user} 首次发帖 — 欢迎这位用户加入社区！
original_translation: This is the first time %{user} has posted — let’s welcome them to our community!

value: 我们已经有一段时间没有看到 %{user} 了 — 这位用户上次发帖是%{time}。
original_translation: It’s been a while since we’ve seen %{user} — their last post was %{time}.

value: 发布第一篇帖子时，用户必须输入的最短时间（以毫秒为单位）。如果未达到该阈值，帖子将自动进入审核队列。low 为 1 秒，standard 为 3 秒，high 为 5 秒。
original_translation: Minimum amount of time in milliseconds a user must type for their first post. If the threshold is not met, the post will automatically enter the review queue. Low is 1 second, standard is 3 seconds, high is 5 seconds.

value: 此话题对您置顶，将显示在所属类别的顶部
original_translation: This topic is pinned for you; it will display at the top of its category

value: 此话题对您取消置顶，将以常规顺序显示
original_translation: This topic is unpinned for you; it will display in regular order

value: 仅使用“回复键”查找回复的帖子。警告：禁用此功能将允许基于电子邮件地址的用户身份顶替。
original_translation: Only use the 'reply key' to find the replied-to post. WARNING: disabling this allows user impersonation based on email address.

value: 类别镜像一个邮件列表

您收到此邮件是因为您启用了邮件列表模式。

要退订这些电子邮件，请[点击此处](%{unsubscribe_url})。
original_translation:
You are receiving this because you enabled mailing list mode.

To unsubscribe from these emails, [click here](%{unsubscribe_url}).

value: 您已启用邮件列表模式，因此您将通过电子邮件收到对此话题回复的通知。
original_translation: You have mailing list mode enabled, so you will be notified of replies to this topic via email.

value: 邮件列表模式已启用。电子邮件通知设置被覆盖。
original_translation: Mailing list mode enabled. Email notification settings are overridden.

value: 启用邮件列表模式的用户默认收到电子邮件的频率。
original_translation: Users who enable mailing list mode will receive emails this often by default.

value: 禁止用户启用邮件列表模式（阻止发送任何邮件列表电子邮件。）
original_translation: Disallow users from enabling mailing list mode (prevents any mailing list emails from being sent.)

value: 对用户自己的帖子禁用邮件列表通知
original_translation: Mailing list notifications disabled for user's own posts

value: 您可以在您的偏好设置中查看和更改新的主题跟踪设置。
original_translation: You can view and change your new topic tracking settings in your preferences.

value: 如果引用出现在帖子的开头、是整个帖子的引用、并且来自相邻帖子的引用，则自动删除引用。有关详细信息，请参阅从直接回复中移除完整引用
original_translation: Automatically remove quotation if (a) it appears at the start of a post, (b) it is of an entire post, and (c) it is from the immediately preceding post. For details, see Removal of full quotes from direct replies

value: 确定要永久删除您的帐户吗？此操作无法撤销！
original_translation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone!

value: 当前没有新内容……过一会儿再来！
original_translation: Nothing new at the moment... check back soon!

value: 当前没有新内容……过一会儿再来！
original_translation: Nothing new at the moment... check back soon!

value:
@%{username} 的所有内容将被转移到 %{targetUsername}。在内容转移后，@%{username} 的帐户将被删除。

此操作无法撤销！

要继续，请输入 %{text}
original_translation:
All of @%{username}'s content will be transferred and attributed to @%{targetUsername}. After the content is transferred, @%{username}'s account will be deleted.

This can not be undone!

To continue type: %{text}

value:
确定要删除 @%{username} 发布的 %{post_count} 个帖子吗？

此操作无法撤销！

继续输入：%{text}
original_translation:
Are you sure you would like to delete %{post_count} posts by @%{username}?

This can not be undone!

To continue type: %{text}

value: 您正在删除 %{name}。此操作无法撤销。如果您改变主意，则必须重新注册此身份验证器。
original_translation: You are deleting %{name}. You can't undo this action. If you change your mind, you have to register this authenticator again.
Are you sure you want to revoke this badge?

value: 已被自动撤销，上次活动超过 %{count} 天前
original_translation: Automatically revoked, last activity more than %{count} days ago

value: 无法使用 %{provider_name} 撤销您的帐户。
original_translation: Failed to revoke your account with %{provider_name}.

value: 确定要删除此用户吗？此操作无法撤销！
original_translation: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This is permanent!

value: 撤销自上次保存以来对此颜色所做的变更。
original_translation: Undo your changes to this color since the last time it was saved.

value: 撤销访问权限撤销操作
已被自动撤销，超过 %{count} 天前创建
original_translation: Automatically revoked, created at more than %{count} days ago

value: 您正在删除备份代码。此操作无法撤销。如果您改变主意，则必须重新生成备份代码。
original_translation: You are deleting backup codes. You can't undo this action. If you change your mind, you have to regenerate backup codes.

value: 允许用户在“帖子投票”话题中撤销投票的分钟数（0 为不限制）
original_translation: Number of minutes users are allowed to undo votes in Post Voting topics (enter 0 for no limit)

value: 允许撤销对帖子的最近操作（例如，举报等）的分钟数。
original_translation: Number of minutes users are allowed to undo recent actions on a post (like, flag, etc).

value: 确定要删除此传入网络钩子吗？此操作无法撤销。
original_translation: Are you sure you want to delete this incoming webhook? This cannot be un-done.

value: 您无法在投票后的 %{count} 分钟后撤销投票。
original_translation: You cannot undo vote %{count} minutes after voting.

value: 确定要删除此帖子的所有修订吗？此操作无法撤销。
original_translation: Are you sure you want to delete all of the revisions on this post? This action is permanent.

value: 查看 %{count} 个新的或更新过的话题
找到零个结果；显示%{count}个AI搜索结果
original_translation: Zero results found, showing %{count} AI results

value: 用户被封禁且不是私信
original_translation: User is suspended, not a message

value: %{icon} 被 %{username} 于 帖子 #%{post_number} 中解决
original_translation: %{icon} Solved by %{username} in post #%{post_number}

value: 当“发件人”标头与“回复到”地址匹配时，就会发生这种情况。
original_translation: Happens when the From header matches the reply by email address.

value: 为匿名用户从网络浏览器的语言标头设置界面语言
original_translation: Set interface language for anonymous users from their web browser's language headers
